items.title: Stephen Colbert says CBS blocked James Talarico interview from air

items.title: Potomac River sewage spill: Trump says Democrats need to ask for his help
items.description: The collapse of a pipe on the Potomac Interceptor sewer line caused more than 200 million gallons of sewer wastewater to gush into the Potomac River.

items.title: Man ran at U.S. Capitol with shotgun and tactical vest: Capitol Police chief
items.description: U.S. Capitol Police Chief Michael Sullivan commended his officers, saying this is why they conduct monthly active-shooter exercises.
